name: traefik
title: Traefik Reverse Proxy
description: Modern reverse proxy and load balancer with automatic SSL via Let's Encrypt, Docker integration, Cloudflare DNS challenge, and a file-based routing system organized by stack category. Includes Docker Socket Proxy for secure Docker API access.

optional_services.label: Include Docker Socket Proxy
optional_services.description: Uncheck if Docker Socket Proxy is already deployed in another stack

variables.name: TRAEFIK_PORT_HTTP
variables.label: HTTP Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for HTTP traffic (redirects to HTTPS)

variables.name: TRAEFIK_PORT_HTTPS
variables.label: HTTPS Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for HTTPS traffic

variables.name: TRAEFIK_PORT_DASHBOARD
variables.label: Dashboard Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Traefik dashboard (default 8180 to avoid conflicts with common services)

variables.name: TRAEFIK_DOMAIN
variables.label: Primary Domain
variables.description: Primary domain for SSL certificates and default routing rules (e.g. example.com)

variables.name: TRAEFIK_ACME_EMAIL
variables.label: ACME Email
variables.description: Email address for Let's Encrypt certificate registration

variables.name: TRAEFIK_TRUSTED_LAN
variables.label: Trusted LAN Subnet
variables.description: Local network CIDR for IP allowlists (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24)

variables.name: CF_DNS_API_TOKEN
variables.label: Cloudflare DNS API Token
variables.description: Cloudflare API token for DNS-01 ACME challenge (leave empty to use HTTP challenge instead)
